Name: TENTATIVE_PLAYER_PARAM_ST
Description: Misselaneous player params. Mostly DS3 leftovers

Fields.Description: This is the identifier used for the SFXID of the foot effect. It corresponds to ZZZ of XYYZZZ.
Fade time to hide the player during precision shooting. The unit is seconds.
This is the correction value used to calculate the player's poise recovery time.
If you die while your death level is above this value, you will become a hollow.
Upper limit probability of drawing the fruit of the giant tree when invaded
Animation ID when picking up a dropped item
Animation ID when picking up an item from a treasure chest (not used?)
Insufficient status, Basic attack power reduction amount
Insufficient, status Stamina consumption multiplier
Insufficient status, Repelling attack power
The maximum status value at which the performance increases, used when calculating the status correction value of the shield's performance.
Maximum negative stamina
Material switching interpolation time when overlapped and wet
Client bottle correction magnification during multiplayer
Basic probability of drawing the fruit of the giant tree when invaded
Giant fruit lottery bonus probability when invaded
The angle at which the kick can be taken when viewed from the front of the player
Analog weight ratio for NPC players [%]. Light.
Analog weight ratio for NPC players [%]. Normal.
Analog weight ratio for NPC players [%]. Heavy.
Analog weight ratio for NPC players [%]. Overweight.
Analog weight ratio for NPC players [%]. SuperLight.
ID of the special effect applied to the dark spirit of the Giant Nut Seed
Standard ID of special effects applied for lap correction
Offset to add to model ID when displaying arrow and bolt models when equipped in slot 1. (Model Id + Offset value)
1-step threshold judgment value [%] when displaying an arrow or bolt model and applying a display mask based on the number of arrows. (If it is more than this value, it will be displayed in 1 step)

Two-step threshold judgment value [%] when displaying arrow and bolt models and applying a display mask based on the number of arrows. (If it is more than this value, it will be displayed in two stages)
How quickly the Poison status bar will drain on player characters
How quickly the Terror status bar will drain on player characters
How quickly the Burn status bar will drain on player characters
How quickly the Enfeeble status bar will drain on player characters
How quickly the Shock status bar will drain on player characters
How quickly the Poison status bar will drain on Npc's
How quickly the Terror status bar will drain on Npc's
How quickly the Burn status bar will drain on Npc's
How quickly the Enfeeble status bar will drain on Npc's
How quickly the Shock status bar will drain on Npc's
If the current HP is below this value, the player will be on the brink of death.
Correction multiplier for the number of client bottles held in multiplayer mode (Arena/Duel)
Offset of the number of client bottles held in multiplayer mode (Arena/Duel)
Correction multiplier for the number of client bottles in possession during multiplayer (Arena/Brawl)
Offset of number of client bottles held in multiplayer (Arena/Brawl)
Correction multiplier for the number of client bottles in possession during multiplayer (Arena/Co-op)
Offset of the number of client bottles held in multiplayer mode (Arena/Co-op)
Rate of money lost at death
